name: Saving Britain's Pubs with Tom Kerridge
original_name: Saving Britain's Pubs with Tom Kerridge
overview: Award-winning publican Tom Kerridge helps four struggling pubs to turn around their fortunes. When Covid-19 strikes it puts the whole industry, including Tom’s own pubs, in peril.

trailers.title: Saving Britain’s Pubs with Tom Kerridge: Trailer | BBC Trailers
